sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root חָשַׁךְ), darkness, Isa. 29:15 . Ps. 88:19 , מְיֻדָּעַי מַחְשָׁךְ “my acquaintances (are) in darkness;” i.e. have withdrawn from my sight.

Pl. מַחֲשַׁכִּים obscure or dark places, Psa 88:7 74:20 , מַחֲשַׁכֵּי אֶרֶץ “the secret places of the earth.” Specially of Hades, Psa 143:3 Lam 3:6.
